name: Rank-Up-Magic Limited Barian's Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リミテッド・バリアンズ・フォース
desc: Target 1 Rank 4 Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster you control, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to that target also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.)
eff: Target 1 Rank 4 Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster you control, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to that target also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.)

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
